INVICTUS.Tab.Label: Invictus
INVICTUS.Error.RequiresCoC7: Cthulhu Invictus requires the Call of Cthulhu 7th Edition (CoC7) system. Please install and activate CoC7.
INVICTUS.RomanName.Title: Roman Name
INVICTUS.Status.Title: Status & Wealth
INVICTUS.Status.Label: Status
INVICTUS.Religion.Title: Religion & Philosophy
INVICTUS.Religion.Label: Religion / Philosophy
INVICTUS.Faith.Title: Faith & Luck
INVICTUS.Faith.Hint: Faith points may be spent like Luck, but only in circumstances related to your patron deity or philosophical school. Recover weekly on successful POW rolls.
INVICTUS.Settings.OptionalInfection.Name: Optional Rule: Infection
INVICTUS.Settings.OptionalInfection.Hint: When enabled, wounds from battle carry a risk of infection. Major Wounds trigger a CON check; failure means the wound becomes infected with increasing severity.
INVICTUS.Settings.OptionalIllOmens.Name: Optional Rule: Ill Omens
INVICTUS.Settings.OptionalIllOmens.Hint: When enabled, investigators may consult omens before significant actions. Results grant Bonus or Penalty dice via Active Effects.
INVICTUS.Settings.OptionalFaithAndLuck.H: When enabled, a Faith attribute appears on the character sheet. Faith points work like Luck but only apply to situations related to the investigator's religion or philosophy.
INVICTUS.Settings.OptionalAugury.Name: Optional Rule: Augury (Full Rules)
INVICTUS.Settings.OptionalAugury.Hint: When enabled, expands augury into the full five-type system (Ex Caelo, Ex Avibus, Ex Tripudiis, Ex Quadrupedibus, Ex Diris). Requires Science (Augury) skill.
INVICTUS.Settings.OptionalExperienced.Hi: When enabled, adds additional skill points during character creation for starting investigators with more experience.
INVICTUS.Settings.CurrencyUnit.Name: Currency Display
INVICTUS.Settings.CurrencyUnit.Hint: Choose how currency amounts are labelled on the character sheet.
INVICTUS.Infection.Title: Infection
INVICTUS.Infection.MildDesc: The wound festers. The character loses 1 HP per day and suffers -5% to physical skills until treated.
INVICTUS.Infection.Scheduled: {name}'s major wound may become infected. A CON check will be required in {hours} hours.
INVICTUS.Infection.ScheduledHint: The infection check triggers when world time advances past the 24-hour mark.
INVICTUS.Infection.TreatmentAttempt: Treating {name}'s {stage}. A Medicine roll at {difficulty} difficulty is required.
INVICTUS.Infection.TreatmentRollHint: The Keeper should call for a Medicine roll. Use the module API to resolve the outcome.
INVICTUS.Infection.TreatmentFailed: Treatment for {name} failed. The infection persists.
INVICTUS.Omens.Title: Reading the Omens
INVICTUS.Omens.FavorableDesc: The gods smile upon this endeavour. Bonus Die on all rolls for the encounter.
INVICTUS.Omens.NeutralDesc: The gods are silent. No modifier applies.
INVICTUS.Omens.UnfavorableDesc: The gods warn against this course. Penalty Die on all rolls for the encounter.
INVICTUS.Omens.NoAugur: No augur selected. Use /omen [character name] or select a token.
INVICTUS.Faith.NoActor: No character found. Use /faith spend [amount] [character name].
INVICTUS.Faith.NoReligion: {name} has no patron religion or philosophy set.
INVICTUS.Faith.PatronNote: Faith points apply only to circumstances related to {religion}.
INVICTUS.Faith.RecoveryFailed: {name}'s devotion was insufficient this week. No Faith recovered.
INVICTUS.Augury.Title: Augury
INVICTUS.Augury.ExCaeloDesc: Reading omens from the sky, clouds, lightning, and celestial phenomena.
INVICTUS.Augury.ExAvibusDesc: Interpreting the flight patterns, calls, and behaviour of birds.
INVICTUS.Augury.ExTripudiisDesc: Observing the feeding behaviour of sacred chickens. A tripudium solistimum (eager eating with grain falling) is the most favorable sign.
INVICTUS.Augury.ExQuadrupedibusDesc: Reading signs from the movement and behaviour of four-legged animals.
INVICTUS.Augury.ExDirisDesc: A catch-all reading of unusual phenomena: earthquakes, strange sounds, unexpected events.
INVICTUS.Augury.ExInfernisDesc: A forbidden ritual calling upon powers from beyond. Available only to cultists. Requires dark ritual components.
INVICTUS.Augury.ExInfernisFumble: Something has gone terribly wrong with the dark ritual. The Keeper determines the consequence.
INVICTUS.Augury.ExInfernisSanCost: Performing Ex Infernis costs 1/1D4 Sanity regardless of the outcome.
